name: Contrast (Minimum)
description: Visual presentation of text and images of text has a contrast ratio of at least 4.5:1, except for large text (3:1).

name: Non-text Content
description: All non-text content that is presented to the user has a text alternative that serves the equivalent purpose (e.g. img alt, aria-label).

name: Keyboard Accessible
description: All functionality of the content is operable through a keyboard interface without requiring specific timings for individual keystrokes.
